title: salix × richenii
intro: Salix × richenii, also known as hybrid willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a cross between the weeping willow (Salix babylonica) and the goat willow (Salix caprea). The bark and leaves of Salix × richenii have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Salix × richenii is typically used as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
